a Luxembourgish language test pass certificate; a certificate confirming the applicant attended the 'Vivre ensemble au Grand-Duché de Luxembourg' course or passed the exam covering the course;

People applying for citizenship must pass the Luxembourgish language test (Sproochentest) at the Institut national des langues Luxembourg (INLL). This exam assesses A2 level for oral expression and B1 level for oral understanding. Preparatory courses are organised by the INLL, the Service de la formation des adultes and its partners.
The ‘Sproochentest’ is the only recognised certification for applying to obtain Luxembourgish nationality.
The certificate is valid for an unlimited period of time.

The certificate for this course ... is issued ... to individuals who have either completed the 24-hour course or successfully passed the exam covering the following topics: Fundamental rights of citizens; State and municipal institutions in the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg; The history of the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg and European integration.
In addition, online courses are offered in English.

The registration fee for the Luxembourgish language test is set at EUR 75. ... you may be reimbursed your registration fees relating to: ... the Luxembourgish language test ... the course ... approved by the minister responsible for national education.
If you meet the conditions, you can only send your claim for reimbursement after you have submitted your application for Luxembourg nationality to the civil registrar of the relevant commune.

These courses are organised by the Service de la formation des adultes ... or by providers holding ministerial accreditation ... Interested persons are advised to verify that the chosen course has the required ministerial accreditation.

The certificate will be returned with an official seal certifying the participation in a Luxembourgish language course meeting the conditions of article 28 of the law of March 8, 2017 on Luxembourg citizenship.
Plan 1 Annual access – €980 incl. VAT ... Plan 2 Monthly access – €96/month incl. VAT ...
Registration for the official Sproochentest is entirely separate from our preparation platform. It is done directly through the Institut National des Langues Luxembourg (INLL).
